overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character in ancient Egyptian attire walking through a desert canyon at night. The character travels along sandy paths between rocky cliffs under bright moonlight, eventually approaching distant ruins on the horizon.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow desert canyon passage with high rock walls

events.description: full moon becomes visible above the canyon walls, illuminating the scene

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow canyon passage, following the sandy trail

entered.detail: tall layered rock wall forming the left side of the canyon
rocky cliff face on the right side of the path
sandy trail with vehicle tracks running through the canyon floor
bright full moon visible in the night sky above the canyon

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow desert canyon with high rock walls on both sides. Around the 8-second mark, the full moon becomes visible above the canyon walls, casting pale light on the sandy path below.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitioning canyon opening to wide desert plain

events.description: canyon opens up to reveal wider desert landscape and distant rock formations

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the canyon walls recede and the landscape opens into desert

entered.detail: large layered rock outcroppings visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The canyon gradually opens up into a wider desert landscape. The right rock wall falls away to reveal open desert, while distant rock formations become visible on the horizon ahead. The left cliff recedes to the mid-distance as the character progresses.

scene_state.functional_zone: open desert plain approaching ancient ruins

events.description: ancient stone ruins or settlement become visible on the distant horizon

agents.ego_description: walking across the open desert toward the distant ruins on the horizon

entered.detail: ancient stone structures or settlement visible on the horizon, appearing as a dark mass against the sky
small rocks and boulders scattered across the desert floor

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the open desert plain with the canyon wall now far to the left. Ancient ruins become visible in the distance ahead, marking a destination on the horizon. The terrain remains sandy with scattered rocks as the character approaches the distant settlement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a restrictive desert canyon that gradually expands into a vast, moonlit open plain. It begins with the character walking between towering rock walls, where the full moon eventually emerges above the cliffs to cast a pale glow over the sandy path. As the character progresses, the canyon walls recede and the right cliff falls away, opening the view to a wide desert landscape with distant rock formations on the horizon. The scene then shifts into a broad desert plain with the remaining canyon wall far to the left, revealing ancient ruins in the distance. Finally, the camera continues across the sandy, rock-strewn terrain as the character approaches the distant settlement.
